etymology.description: 肉(肉) (ròu, "meat") + 犬(犬) (quǎn, "dog") = depiction of a dog with meat -> used as a phonetic component
etymology.interpretation: The character 肰 originally combined the elements for "meat" and "dog," suggesting perhaps the action of a dog with meat, and was repurposed as a phonetic component in other characters like 然(然) (rán, "thus").
